touches.ai_summary: Cold outreach to Tariq Yang introducing AskElephant's conversation intelligence platform for PropTech teams. Highlighted forecasting accuracy improvements and automation capabilities relevant to their CS operations.

Follow-up email to Tariq after initial outreach. Shared case study on forecasting accuracy gains for similar PropTech company. Tariq responded expressing interest in learning more about automation capabilities.

questions_asked.question: How does your platform differ from Fireflies?
questions_asked.answer: AskElephant provides advanced forecasting models and custom automation workflows beyond basic transcription, with native CRM integration for deal intelligence.

touches.ai_summary: Initial qualification call with Tariq. Discussed current forecasting challenges at EastgateLens and team size. Tariq mentioned they're evaluating Fireflies but concerned about accuracy. Confirmed budget authority and timeline.

questions_asked.question: What's your current process for call analysis and forecasting?
questions_asked.answer: Manual note-taking and spreadsheet tracking. Forecasting accuracy around 60%, need to improve to 80%+.

questions_asked.question: What's your implementation timeline and onboarding process?
questions_asked.answer: Standard implementation is 2-3 weeks with dedicated CSM. We provide training and custom workflow setup.

next_steps: Tariq to map out current CS team structure

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up qualification call. Tariq shared team structure: 57 people across CS, Sales, and RevOps. Discussed integrations with their current tech stack (Salesforce, Slack). Identified Willow Chen (COO) as exec sponsor.

questions_asked.question: Who else should be involved in the evaluation process?
questions_asked.answer: Willow Chen our COO will need to approve. Also David Wu and Carter Okafor from sales, Anika Walsh from IT, and Sebastian White from RevOps.

questions_asked.question: Can you support our Salesforce instance and data security requirements?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, native Salesforce integration with SOC2 Type II and enterprise-grade security controls.

touches.ai_summary: Qualification call focused on use cases. Tariq detailed forecasting pain points: inconsistent deal updates, lack of visibility into customer sentiment, manual QA processes. Confirmed automations_plus_consulting tier interest for custom workflow support.

questions_asked.question: What level of consulting support comes with the automations package?
questions_asked.answer: Dedicated solutions architect for first 90 days, quarterly business reviews, and custom automation development included.

next_steps: Prepare custom demo focused on forecasting

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email with security documentation and case studies. Addressed Tariq's questions about Salesforce sync frequency and data retention policies.
Email to schedule discovery call with wider stakeholder group. Tariq confirmed Willow's availability and asked for agenda to share with team beforehand.

questions_asked.question: Can you send an agenda so I can prep the team?
questions_asked.answer: Shared detailed agenda covering current workflow review, pain points discussion, and platform overview.

touches.ai_summary: Pre-discovery alignment call with Tariq. Reviewed agenda and confirmed team members attending. Discussed Fireflies evaluation status - still in pilot but not meeting forecasting accuracy needs.

questions_asked.question: What's the status of your Fireflies evaluation?
questions_asked.answer: In pilot with 10 users. Transcription is good but lacks forecasting intelligence and automation we need.

touches.ai_summary: Full team discovery call with Tariq, David Wu, Anika Walsh, and Sebastian White. Walked through current forecasting workflow, pain points with manual processes, and integration requirements. Team expressed concerns about change management and user adoption. Discussed competitive positioning vs Fireflies.

questions_asked.question: How do you ensure user adoption across sales and CS teams?
questions_asked.answer: Structured onboarding program, champion identification, and usage analytics. Average 85% adoption within 60 days.

questions_asked.question: What's your current forecasting accuracy and what's your target?
questions_asked.answer: Currently 58-62% accuracy. Need to hit 80% to meet board requirements. Struggling with late-stage deal slippage.

questions_asked.question: What's your pricing model and how does it compare to Fireflies?
questions_asked.answer: Seat-based pricing with automation tier add-ons. Higher than Fireflies but includes forecasting AI and consulting support.

objections: Team concerned about learning curve and time investment for setup

touches.ai_summary: Post-discovery debrief with Tariq. Addressed team concerns about implementation timeline. Tariq confirmed strong interest but needs to build business case for Willow with ROI projections.

questions_asked.question: Can you help build the business case with forecasting accuracy impact?
questions_asked.answer: Will provide custom ROI model based on your deal volume and current accuracy metrics.

touches.ai_summary: Sent custom ROI calculator showing projected $2.1M revenue impact from improved forecasting accuracy. Also included implementation timeline and change management resources.
Demo scheduling email. Tariq confirmed attendance and requested focus on automation workflows and Salesforce integration during demo.
Pre-demo email with custom environment setup. Shared demo credentials and requested sample call recordings for personalized demo experience.

Full platform demo with Tariq, David, Carter, and Sebastian. Walked through conversation intelligence, forecasting models, and automation workflows using their sample data. Team engaged positively. Demonstrated superior forecasting accuracy vs Fireflies' basic sentiment analysis. Discussed custom automation for their specific deal stages.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the forecasting model to our specific deal stages and product lines?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, models are trainable on your historical data. Consulting team helps optimize for your sales motion.

questions_asked.question: How does the Salesforce sync handle our custom fields and objects?
questions_asked.answer: Full field mapping during implementation. Support for custom objects, fields, and complex relationship structures.

questions_asked.question: What's your evaluation timeline and decision process?
questions_asked.answer: Need technical validation with IT, then exec review with Willow. Targeting decision by end of quarter.

touches.ai_summary: Post-demo follow-up with recording, technical documentation, and answers to questions raised during demo. Confirmed technical eval schedule with Anika Walsh.

Technical evaluation session with Anika Walsh and Tariq. Deep dive on security architecture, data governance, API capabilities, and infrastructure requirements. Anika raised questions about SOC2 scope and data residency. Discussed SSO setup and user provisioning. Overall positive technical validation.

questions_asked.question: What's covered under your SOC2 certification and do you support data residency requirements?
questions_asked.answer: SOC2 Type II covers full platform. US and EU data residency options available on enterprise tier.

questions_asked.question: How do you handle PII and sensitive customer data in call recordings?
questions_asked.answer: Automatic PII redaction, data retention controls, and role-based access. GDPR and CCPA compliant.

questions_asked.question: What's the API rate limit and can we build custom integrations?
questions_asked.answer: Enterprise tier includes elevated rate limits and API access for custom integrations. Full documentation available.

touches.ai_summary: Executive alignment meeting with Willow Chen, Tariq Yang. Presented business case, ROI projections, and strategic value of improved forecasting. Willow engaged on competitive landscape and asked about Fireflies comparison. Discussed budget allocation and Q2 priorities. Positive reception to consulting support model.

questions_asked.question: Why should we choose AskElephant over Fireflies given the price difference?
questions_asked.answer: Fireflies provides transcription. AskElephant provides forecasting intelligence, custom automation, and dedicated consulting - directly impacting your revenue predictability.

questions_asked.question: What's the total investment including consulting and what's the expected payback period?
questions_asked.answer: Total annual investment $81,600 for 57 seats with consulting. Based on your metrics, projected 6-month payback from forecasting improvements.

questions_asked.question: What's your decision timeline and who else needs to be involved?
questions_asked.answer: Need to review with procurement (David Wu, Carter Okafor) and finalize budget. Targeting decision within 3 weeks.

objections: Price point significantly higher than Fireflies pilot

touches.ai_summary: Sent exec meeting recap, ROI summary, and competitive comparison document to Tariq for Willow's review. Addressed pricing positioning vs Fireflies.
Follow-up email with customer references from similar PropTech companies. Offered to arrange reference calls with two customers who switched from Fireflies.

Sent formal proposal for 57 seats on automations_plus_consulting tier: $81,600 ACV. Included implementation timeline, success metrics, and consulting deliverables. Tariq acknowledged receipt and scheduled proposal review call.

Proposal review call with Tariq. Walked through pricing structure, contract terms, and deliverables. Tariq confirmed strong alignment on value but flagged that procurement will push on pricing given Fireflies alternative. Discussed payment terms and quarterly vs annual billing.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on pricing given we're comparing to Fireflies at a much lower price point?
questions_asked.answer: Some flexibility on deal structure but consulting tier pricing reflects dedicated support investment. Can discuss creative payment terms.

questions_asked.question: What's procurement's main concern - total price or budget timing?
questions_asked.answer: Mainly price vs Fireflies. They'll want to see 15-20% discount to justify the premium positioning.

touches.ai_summary: Post-proposal email clarifying consulting deliverables and implementation timeline. Reinforced value differentiation vs Fireflies to support Tariq's internal business case.
Email to Tariq checking status after procurement review. Tariq responded that David and Carter are asking for discount to 15-20% off to approve. Budget is available but need price justification.

questions_asked.question: Can you do 15% off to help us get this approved?
questions_asked.answer: Will review with leadership and get back with options. Want to understand commitment level and timeline first.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email proposing 10% discount for annual prepayment and case study participation. Tariq said he'd discuss with team but thinks they'll need closer to 15% to move forward.
Scheduled exec meeting with Willow Chen to discuss pricing and strategic value. Meeting was rescheduled at Willow's request due to board meeting conflict. Tariq confirmed still high priority.

Pricing negotiation call with Tariq. Discussed creative deal structure options: 12% discount for annual prepay, multi-year lock-in, or scaled seat expansion plan. Tariq concerned that Fireflies pricing pressure making this difficult internally. Explored value vs cost positioning.

questions_asked.question: What if we started with fewer seats to reduce initial investment?
questions_asked.answer: Could do 40-seat start with expansion clause, but would lose consulting tier benefits that drive the ROI.

questions_asked.question: Is the Fireflies evaluation still active or have you decided against it?
questions_asked.answer: Still in pilot with mixed feedback. Team likes AskElephant better but price gap is the main blocker now.

objections: Fireflies pricing creating significant price pressure, hard to justify 3x cost difference internally

touches.ai_summary: Rescheduled exec meeting with Willow Chen. Discussed strategic importance of forecasting accuracy and competitive positioning. Willow supportive of investment if pricing can be justified. Acknowledged Fireflies is cheaper but lacks intelligence layer. Authorized Tariq to negotiate final terms.

questions_asked.question: What's your best and final offer to close this quarter?
questions_asked.answer: Can approve 13% discount ($70,992 ACV) for annual prepayment and case study commitment. Final approval from VP.

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation call with Tariq after exec meeting. Reviewed 13% discount offer ($70,992 ACV). Tariq said procurement will accept at 15% ($69,360). Discussed contract terms, implementation start date, and success criteria. Both sides motivated to close.

questions_asked.question: Can you meet us at 15% to get this done?
questions_asked.answer: Let me check with leadership. If we can get to 15%, would you commit to close this week?

questions_asked.question: Assuming we agree on price, are there any other blockers to signing?
questions_asked.answer: Just legal review of MSA - should be quick. No other blockers once pricing is finalized.

touches.ai_summary: Pricing approval call with Tariq. Confirmed 15% discount approved ($69,360 ACV) for 57 seats, annual prepay, case study, and multi-year expansion commitment. Tariq excited to move forward. Discussed implementation kickoff timing.

questions_asked.question: When can we target implementation start?
questions_asked.answer: Ideally within 2 weeks of contract signature. Need to coordinate with IT and CS leadership.

touches.ai_summary: Final pricing confirmation and contract send. Reviewed all terms with Tariq: 57 seats, $69,360 ACV (15% discount), automations_plus_consulting tier, annual prepay, case study commitment. Contract sent to David Wu and legal for review. Tariq confirmed will sign within 48 hours pending legal approval. Discussed onboarding and success planning.

questions_asked.question: What happens immediately after signature?
questions_asked.answer: Implementation team will reach out within 24 hours to schedule kickoff. Dedicated CSM assigned and technical setup begins.

questions_asked.question: Any concerns before we finalize?
questions_asked.answer: No concerns. Team is excited. Just need legal to bless the MSA and we're good to go.
